columns.extraction_plan: On page 3, refer to the CONSORT flow diagram (Figure 1). Locate the box for "Placebo + docetaxel + ADT" and find the number of patients "Analyzed for primary end point", which is n = 654. Alternatively, on page 5, refer to Table 1, "Baseline Demographics and Patient Characteristics for the Subgroups of Patients by Disease Volume and Disease Risk in ARASENS". In the "All Patients (N = 1,305)" column, under the "Placebo" sub-column, the total number of patients is 654.
